headings.rules: tracking-tight for >32px, never center by default, use font-medium or font-semibold for clarity. Used for Section Titles and Wizard Steps.

body.rules: leading-relaxed, left-aligned, use font-light for secondary text. Used for descriptions and UI labels.

technical_data.rules: Used strictly for prices (CAPEX/OPEX), dimensions, coordinates, product IDs, and data tables.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The Control Room Grid (For Dashboards / Analytics) + Canvas Area
layout_and_spacing.app_shell: h-screen w-full flex overflow-hidden bg-[#09090b] text-white font-['Manrope']
layout_and_spacing.left_sidebar: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-[#27272a] bg-[#09090b] flex flex-col z-20
layout_and_spacing.right_sidebar: w-96 flex-shrink-0 border-l border-[#27272a] bg-[#09090b]/80 backdrop-blur-2xl flex flex-col z-20 shadow-2xl
layout_and_spacing.panels: p-6 rounded-xl border border-[#27272a] bg-[#18181b] shadow-xl
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-2, p-4 for internal widget spacing; p-6, p-8 for containers.

buttons.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#0ea5e9] to-[#10b981] text-white font-medium rounded-lg hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(14,165,233,0.4)] transition-all px-4 py-2
buttons.secondary: bg-[#18181b] text-white hover:bg-[#27272a] border border-[#27272a] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.icon: p-2 rounded-md hover:bg-[#27272a] text-[#a1a1aa] hover:text-white transition-colors
buttons.export_pdf: bg-[#ffffff] text-[#09090b] font-semibold rounded-lg hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors px-4 py-2 flex items-center gap-2

cards.product: bg-[#18181b] border border-[#27272a] rounded-lg p-3 hover:border-[#0ea5e9] transition-all cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing group hover:shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(14,165,233,0.1)] flex items-center gap-3
cards.ai_recommendation: relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-[#10b981]/40 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#18181b] to-[#09090b] p-5 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.1)]

wizard.container: flex items-center space-x-2 mb-6 overflow-x-auto pb-2
wizard.step_active: flex items-center text-sm font-semibold text-[#0ea5e9] whitespace-nowrap
wizard.step_inactive: flex items-center text-sm font-medium text-[#71717a] whitespace-nowrap
wizard.indicator_active: w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-[#0ea5e9]/20 border border-[#0ea5e9] flex items-center justify-center text-xs mr-2
wizard.indicator_inactive: w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-[#18181b] border border-[#27272a] flex items-center justify-center text-xs mr-2

cost_calculator.total_row: flex justify-between items-center text-lg font-bold pt-4 border-t border-[#27272a] text-[#0ea5e9]

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used on the right sidebar (Real-time quote) and canvas floating controls. Use `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#09090b]/80 border-white/5`.
visual_enhancers.grid_background: Crucial for the 'Engineer' feel. Use CSS: `background-image: radial-gradient(#27272a 1px, transparent 1px); background-size: 24px 24px;` on the canvas area.
visual_enhancers.tracing_beam: Apply an animated glowing line effect (`mask-image`) on AI recommendation cards to make them feel cutting-edge.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Replace soft drop shadows with sharp 'inner glow' highlights or ambient colored glows. e.g., `shadow-[inset_0_1px_0_rgba(255,255,255,0.05)]`.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle scale-up (`scale-[1.02]`) on interactive cards. Border color transitions from `#27272a` to `#0ea5e9`.
motion_and_interactions.drag_drop: Items being dragged should have `scale-105`, opacity-90, and a drop shadow. Drop targets on the canvas should highlight with a dashed `#0ea5e9` border.
motion_and_interactions.page_transitions: Use Framer Motion for wizard step content transitions (slide in from right/left with fade).

icons.usage: 20x20 for standard icons, 16x16 for metadata. Stroke width 1.5 for a technical, crisp look.

media.description: Overhead view of a riverbank campsite. Use as the background for the drag & drop canvas if no plan is uploaded.
White surveillance camera. Use as a thumbnail in the product catalog sidebar.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text, especially muted text (#71717a), passes WCAG AA on the #09090b background.
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0ea5e9] focus:outline-none focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#09090b] for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Inject the fonts (Outfit, Manrope, JetBrains Mono) via Google Fonts in index.html.
2. Initialize a full-screen application layout (`h-screen w-full overflow-hidden flex`). This is a workspace tool, NOT a scrolling website.
3. Structure: Left Sidebar (Wizard + Products), Center (Canvas Planner), Right Sidebar (Real-time Quote & AI).
4. The Canvas (Site Planner) MUST have the dotted grid background applied. Center the floor plan placeholder image in the canvas.
5. For the Drag & Drop functionality, use HTML5 Drag and Drop or a lightweight library, mapping items to coordinates on the grid.
6. AI Recommendations should stand out visually using the `#10b981` (emerald) accent color.
7. Do NOT use default Tailwind blue. Strictly use the defined HEX codes for RECRA Blue (#0ea5e9) and RECRA Green (#10b981).
8. Ensure every form input, button, and drag item has a valid `data-testid`.
